Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 391.4
Off Calendar Aug-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LINDA GERULL'S MOTION TO DISMISS PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391.4.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants City and County of San Francisco and Linda Gerull's motion to dismiss pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 391.4, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. Plaintiff Raymond Vincent DiGiacomo Jr. failed to timely furnish the security order by the court on June 9, 2023, and thus dismissal is mandatory. Order signed. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/JMQ)
